codebase-memory.description: codebase-memory-mcp: structural knowledge GRAPH (tree-sitter+LSP, TS+Rust) — query code structure (search_graph/trace_path/get_architecture/get_code_snippet/detect_changes) instead of reading files one-by-one. ~99% fewer tokens for structural questions. Index: project 'root-dowiz' at ~/.cache/codebase-memory-mcp/. Complements VSA (data payloads) + repowise (why-synthesis).

repowise.description: repowise: codebase intelligence — docs, graph, git signals, dead code, decisions

playwright-test.description: playwright agents: planner/generator/healer drive tests against the running app

browser-use.description: browser-use: on-demand agentic browse/extract over MCP (uvx, not hosted; self-host lib not cloud). LLM-backed tools need OpenRouter BYOK env (OPENAI_API_KEY + OPENAI_BASE_URL=https://openrouter.ai/api/v1) — see TOOLING-REGISTRY.md.
